meta.title: PastryCalc — recipe scaling
meta.description: Scale ingredient amounts by target yield

login.heading: Sign in
login.subtitle: Continue with Google to access PastryCalc.
login.redirectNote: Always open the app from the same URL configured in Supabase Redirect URLs (e.g. only localhost, not mixed with 127.0.0.1).
login.errorNoUrl: Could not get Google sign-in URL. Check that the Google provider is enabled in Supabase.

brandBar.adminOnly: Manage mode is only available to administrators (sidebar).

sidebar.manageHint: Enable to edit and delete recipes on cards and in the detail view.

home.noRecipesHint: An administrator can add recipes via recipe management.
home.heading: Recipes
home.selectCategory: Select a category in the sidebar.
home.clickCard: Click a card below — ingredient scaling and notes will appear.

recipeDetail.editHint: Editing is only available to administrators with Manage mode enabled in the sidebar.
recipeDetail.yieldHint: Adjust the value — all ingredients will be recalculated instantly.
recipeDetail.batchTotalHint: Scaled total grouped by unit (weights in g, pcs, etc. separately)

confirmDelete.title: Delete recipe?
confirmDelete.message: Are you sure you want to permanently delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

emptyState.emptyCategory: No recipes in this category yet
emptyState.clickCard: Click a card below — ingredient scaling and notes will appear.
emptyState.addInManage: Add a recipe in Manage mode or choose another category.

admin.errorHint: Make sure the profiles_admin_trigger.sql migration has been applied in Supabase.
admin.heading: User management
admin.subtitle: Grant or revoke the administrator role. The first registered account becomes an admin automatically.
admin.noProfiles: No profiles yet. A profile is created automatically when the first user signs in.

errors.heading: Something went wrong
errors.adminGeneric: An unexpected error occurred in the admin section.

recipeContext.mutationForbidden: Only administrators can edit recipes. Please sign in with an admin account.

account.title: Account settings
account.deleteHint: This action is irreversible. Your account and profile will be permanently removed.
account.deleteConfirmMessage: This action is irreversible. You will lose access to the app. Recipes will be preserved.
